title: IntersectionOverlapContext
description: Represents the context for an intersection overlap.

type.description: Type of this merge connection context.

laneIds.description: The ids of the overlap lane and preceeding lookback lanes before the overlap

distanceBack.description: The distance back from the overlap initiator when multiple lane segments are in the lookback

selfStartDist.description: Starting distance along route lane that the overlap occurs

selfEndDist.description: distance along route lane that the overlap ends

otherStartDist.description: Starting distance along context overlap lane that the overlap starts

otherEndDist.description: Starting distance along context overlap lane that the overlap ends
